title: Craft Planet Polystyrene Balls 40 Pieces, White, Assorted Sizes, for Arts and Crafts, Kids, Kids, Basic Shapes, Perfect Base, Decoupage, Painting, Bauble-Making
features: VERSATILE POLYSTYRENE BALL PACK These balls can be embellished with any decorations of choice! These decorative balls can be used for Christmas decorations with some sequin art and pins
ARTS AND CRAFTS polystyrene ball pack is versatile! Glue them together to create polystyrene animals, stick them together to create fun abstract shapes, or even create a bracelet

ART KIT Grab your paint brush and get creating! If you are looking for creative activities for kids, look no further! With a bit of glitter glue, this pack is a great addition to your kids art & craft supplies

KIDS' CRAFT KITS FOR SCHOOL PROJECTS Got a school project to make your own solar system model? You don't need to purchase a solar system kit! With our polystyrene ball pack, these balls can work as small planets

CREATE Grab your colouring pens, felt tip pens and paint palette and make your own world! Decorate the polystyrene balls with some goggly eyes, use your fab painting and DIY skills to build a flower from these white foam balls
description: Product Description Habercrafts White Polystyrene Balls Are Smooth, Lightweight And Ready To Decorate With Paint, Glitter, Glue, Sequins And Whatever Your Imagination Can Think Of, Let Your Creativity Flow. Made From High-Density Polystyrene Means They Are Surprisingly Durable Making Them Perfect For Crafts, Ornaments, Christmas Tree Decorations, Planets, Mobiles, Flower Arranging, School Projects And More. Simple To Use , Our Styrofoam Spheres Are Easy To Work With, Be It With Glue Or Pigment, Pierced By A Needle And Strung Together, Floating On Water Or Hanging, They Will Be Sure To Look Amazing. A Size & Quantity Pack For Any Size Job . Available In The Full Range Of Sizes (Assorted, 30mm, 40mm, 50mm, 60mm, 70mm, 80mm, 100mm, 120mm, 150mm (Solid & Separable), 200mm (Separable), 250mm (Separable) & 300mm (Separable)) And Packs (1 To 100). Features Premium Quality High Density Non-toxic Great Value Family Run UK Business We serve customers all over the world and take pride in providing our customers with fantastic products. We hope you have a pleasant experience at Habercrafts.
